chunks.title: The Throne and the Coals
chunks.reason: Describes the appearance of the throne above the cherubim and the command to scatter fire.

chunks.title: The Wheels and Living Creatures
chunks.reason: Details the structure of the wheels, their movement, and the connection between the creatures and the wheels.

chunks.title: Departure of Glory
chunks.reason: Records the departure of Yahweh's glory from the temple and identifies the living creatures as cherubim.
